top_issues: Oversized PNG screenshots on secondary app pages
No lazy loading on screenshot galleries
No explicit aspect-ratio reservation for screenshot frames
Render-blocking Google Fonts on the homepage
Off-origin app icons increase connection overhead
next_actions: Convert screenshots to AVIF or WebP
Add loading="lazy" and decoding="async" to below-the-fold images
Reserve screenshot dimensions with width/height or aspect-ratio
Localize fonts or switch to a system stack
Serve key icons from the same origin
